title: Croparium: Arphex
description: Skip grinding tough bosses for Arthropod Phobia Expansions’  biomasses—grow them with biomass farmland instead!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91ef9783825b18f5809794c8df87488f12281daf.png)

Two required dependencies: [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) & [**Arthropod Phobia Expansions + Horror Bosses**](https://modrinth.com/mod/arphex/). 

In the Arthropod Phobia Expansions + Horror Bosses mod, some biomass resources have long been a hassle for players to obtain: you not only have to defeat extremely difficult bosses, but these bosses also drop only tiny amounts of the biomass—barely enough to meet sustained usage needs. 

This mod addresses this problem by adding a stable farming method for 9 biomass types. Now you won’t have to repeatedly grind against tough bosses; instead, you can grow and harvest the required resources consistently through crop cultivation.

**How to Grow?**

To grow this biomass, you first need to prepare special farmland— just hold any type of shovel in your right hand and right-click on soul sand or soul soil. This will convert the block into farmland suitable for growing the biomass crops. Note that this farmland differs from vanilla Minecraft farmland in its “moisture” requirement: it doesn’t rely on water to stay viable. Instead, **Lava** is required within a 4-block horizontal radius.

For details, refer to [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) mod. It includes more comprehensive cultivation instructions to help you get started with farming smoothly.

![Growable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ec3dc48d7986a9312ac4914688ed1e4320361f9.png)
